title: Validate registration failure with a password not meeting security criteria
description: Ensures the system rejects passwords that do not meet the defined security criteria during registration and provides a clear error message.
preconditions: User is on the registration page.

steps.description: 1. Enter a valid, unique email address.
2. Enter a password that violates one of the rules (e.g., 'short').

expected_result: Registration fails. An inline error message with the code 'WEAK_PASSWORD' is displayed, clearly stating all password requirements.
